posts.author: kerenb (keren barkay)
posts.cookedHtml: I am habing trouble with duplicating items that have the ‘duration and timeline’ combo. It works fine on the original item, but then when I use a workflow to duplicate it and push the dates, the duration column us being reset to ‘1’. No matter which number I put there before in the original item. Did anyone experience this issue?
